statement.markdown: Given a sorted array of integers, find the maximum value of the sum of a subarray of size at most K. The sum of a subarray is the sum of the elements in the subarray.
statement.inputFormat:
The first line of the input will contain three space-separated integers: N (Size of the input array), K and S (Sum Limit).

The second line of the input will contain N space-separated integers.
statement.outputFormat: The maximum sum of a subarray of size at most K.
statement.notes:
The input array is sorted in ascending order.

Time: O(N*K)

Space: O(N*K)

examples.explanation: Maximum sum of subarray of size at most 3 is [10,2,3]

hints.text: Use a 2D table to store the sum of subarrays of different sizes

editorial.title: Incorrect Memoization in Subarray Sum
editorial.intuition: The idea is to use a 2D table to store the sum of subarrays of different sizes.
editorial.optimalSolution: Create a 2D table dp where dp[i][j] represents the sum of array elements from index i to j.
commonMistakes: Not using a 2D table to store the sum of subarrays
Not using the correct formula for the dp[i][j]

functionSignature.cpp: int maxSum(vector<int>& nums, int K, int S);
functionSignature.java: int maxSum(int[] nums, int K, int S);
functionSignature.python: def maxSum(self, nums: list[int], K: int, S: int) -> int;
